description:
Markdown-based note-taking app for developers


🚀 Release Notes
This release focuses on UI improvements and overall polish, with a particular emphasis on refining the dark theme experience.
✨ Improvements
- Refined dark theme for a more consistent and premium look
- Improved contrast and readability across the interface
- Enhanced visual hierarchy (backgrounds, panels, and content areas)
- Polished menus and navigation elements
- Smoother and more cohesive UI interactions
